overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage of a character in dark robes exploring a misty mountain valley. The character walks along a winding dirt path through overcast terrain with rocky outcrops, tall grass, and ancient stone ruins, gradually ascending toward a narrow rocky pass.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain valley trail with wildflowers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the distant rock spire, observing the misty valley surroundings

entered.detail: tall pointed rock formation visible in the distance ahead
hazy mountain slopes forming the left valley wall
hazy mountain slopes forming the right valley wall
winding dirt trail with patches of wet mud and puddles
tall green grass and vegetation lining the left side of the path
tall green grass with yellow wildflowers on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open mountain valley on a dirt path, with a prominent rock spire visible in the distance. Tall grass and wildflowers line both sides of the trail under an overcast sky, creating a moody, atmospheric environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding path with ancient stone wall ruins

events.description: ancient stone wall ruins come into view on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: following the curving path leftward past the weathered stone wall ruins

entered.detail: low ancient stone wall running parallel to the left side of the path
small wooden structures or huts visible in the valley ahead
wooden signpost with directional markers appearing on the right

segments.scene_description: The path curves left, revealing ancient stone wall ruins on the left side. The tall rock spire shifts to the left as the character progresses, and distant wooden structures become visible in the valley ahead.

events.description: path curves sharply to the right toward the large rock formation

agents.ego_description: turning right along the winding path, passing the wooden signpost and approaching the rock spire

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face forming the left boundary of the path

segments.scene_description: The character turns right along the winding trail, passing a wooden signpost. The rock spire is now on the right side, and the path becomes more defined by natural rock walls as the valley narrows.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain pass between rock walls

events.description: path narrows significantly between tall rock walls creating a canyon-like passage

agents.ego_description: walking uphill through the narrow rocky passage, approaching the crest of the rise

entered.detail: tall steep rock wall forming the right side of the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The path narrows into a steep, enclosed passage between tall rock walls. The character ascends the incline as vegetation becomes sparse, moving toward a gap in the rocks ahead under the overcast sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open mountain valley that gradually tightens into a steep, enclosed rocky pass. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path lined with wildflowers and tall grass, with a prominent rock spire looming in the distance under an overcast sky. As the path curves left, the scene opens to reveal ancient stone wall ruins and distant wooden structures while the spire shifts position in the landscape. The camera then follows the trail as it turns right past a wooden signpost, with the surrounding valley narrowing and the rock spire moving to the right. Finally, the environment shifts into a steep incline between towering rock walls where vegetation becomes sparse, leading the character upward toward a gap in the stone.
